Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Henry Kwan. Attorney Bill Ford appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendant Michael Blue is present.
Attorneys Cameron Stout and Adanna Love representing the defendant through full scope.

Counsel and litigants confer in D501.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAR-19-2012 is vacated.
